name: PR Draft
description: Composes a comprehensive pull request from all upstream contracts. Automatically prepends BREAKING CHANGE label when the impact analyser detected API surface regressions. Requires operator sign-off before the PR is opened — especially critical when breaking changes are present.

checks.prompt: Generate a comprehensive PR description from all upstream contracts. Include: (1) Feature summary and motivation, (2) Changes made — files, migration, API surface (auto-populate BREAKING CHANGE block from impact-analysis), (3) Testing — test results summary and coverage delta, (4) Migration guide for API consumers (when breaking), (5) Reviewer checklist with specific review focus areas, (6) Labels: breaking-change (if applicable), needs-migration-guide, has-db-migration, (7) Deferred or escalated items from conflict-resolver and ai-integrator.
